value.description: +2 to one ability score of choice.

value.name: Adaptability
value.description: Half-elves gain Skill Focus as a bonus feat at 1st level.

value.name: Elf Blood
value.description: Counts as both elf and human for any effect related to race.

value.name: Elven Immunities
value.description: Immune to magic sleep; +2 vs enchantment.

value.name: Multitalented
value.description: Choose two favored classes; gain +1 hp or +1 skill rank when leveling up either.
